nodes.name: 尼罗河
nodes.summary: 尼罗河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括埃及雁、白眼潜鸭、日本鵪鶉等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT

nodes.name: 日本

nodes.name: 日本鵪鶉
nodes.summary: 日本鵪鶉（Japanese quail，学名 Coturnix japonica），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入雉科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联16个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 雉科
nodes.summary: 雉科（Phasianidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联179种鸟类，如Udzungwa forest partridge、銹紅林鷓鴣、冠鷓鴣等179种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | genus = Coturnix | species = japonica | authority = Temminck & Schlegel, 1848 }} The Japanese quail (Coturnix japonica), also known as the coturnix quail, is a species of Old World quail found in East Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | genus = Coturnix | species = japonica | authority = Temminck & Schlegel, 1848 }} The Japanese quail (Coturnix japonica), also known as the coturnix quail, is a species of Old World quail found in East Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | genus = Coturnix | species = japonica | authority = Temminck & Schlegel, 1848 }} The Japanese quail (Coturnix japonica), also known as the coturnix quail, is a species of Old World quail found in East Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |journal=Biological Conservation |volume=136 |issue=4 |pages=628–635 |doi=10.1016/j.biocon.2007.01.007 |bibcode=2007BCons.136..628P |hdl=2445/108051 |hdl-access=free }} Though several resident populations of this quail have been shown to winter in Japan, most migrate south to areas such as Vietnam, Cambodia, Laos, and southern China. This quail has also been found to reside in many parts of Africa, including Tanzania, Malawi, Kenya, Namibia, Madagascar, and the area of the Nile River Valley extending from Kenya to Egypt. Breeding sites of the Japanese quail are largely localized to East and Central Asia, in such areas as Manchuria, southeastern Siberia, northern Japan, and the Korean Peninsula
